steps.title: Use the parallel lines
steps.content: The $110^\circ$ angle and the angle vertical to $x^\circ$ are same-side interior angles. Since the lines are parallel, those angles are supplementary.

steps.title: Solve the angle equation
steps.content: Vertical angles are congruent, so the angle vertical to $x^\circ$ also has measure $x^\circ$: $$ x+110=180 $$ $$ x=70 $$ The answer is 70.
